short_text: Russell to Netravalkar, Caught by Powell!! Length delivery on middle, Netravalkar backed away a little before looking to
full_text: Russell to Netravalkar, Caught by Powell!! Length delivery on middle, Netravalkar backed away a little before looking to heave it away, hit him high on the bat and went down to long-on, Powell down there had to run in and he covered good ground before leaping forward to complete the catch. Did well not to ground it.

short_text: Russell to Netravalkar, no run, length delivery outside off, Netravalkar stays leg-side and has a swipe, makes no connec
full_text: Russell to Netravalkar, no run, length delivery outside off, Netravalkar stays leg-side and has a swipe, makes no connection again

short_text: Russell to Netravalkar, no run, very full and wide outside off, Netravalkar plonks his bat down at it and misses, beaten
full_text: Russell to Netravalkar, no run, very full and wide outside off, Netravalkar plonks his bat down at it and misses, beaten for pace

short_text: Russell to Ali Khan, 1 run, length delivery outside off, Ali Khan had a big swing at this and it just lobbed past Russel
full_text: Russell to Ali Khan, 1 run, length delivery outside off, Ali Khan had a big swing at this and it just lobbed past Russell's left right off the toe end

short_text: Russell to Ali Khan, 2 runs, slower length delivery on off-stump, Ali Khan drags it away towards deep mid-wicket, they s
full_text: Russell to Ali Khan, 2 runs, slower length delivery on off-stump, Ali Khan drags it away towards deep mid-wicket, they shuffle back for two

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Netravalkar, no run, back of a length on middle, Netravalkar backs away a little looking to stab it in
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Netravalkar, no run, back of a length on middle, Netravalkar backs away a little looking to stab it into the off-side and misses

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nosthush Kenjige, Caught by Pooran!! Length delivery outside off, Nosthush Kenjige shuffled all the wa
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nosthush Kenjige, Caught by Pooran!! Length delivery outside off, Nosthush Kenjige shuffled all the way across his stumps looking for the scoop, not bad thinking but it's never easy executing something like that against someone bowling 140ks, it hits the splice and lobs up before landing straight into Pooran's gloves. 9 down now are the USA.

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nosthush Kenjige, no run, nails the yorker on off-stump, Nosthush Kenjige bunts it back to the bowler
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nosthush Kenjige, no run, nails the yorker on off-stump, Nosthush Kenjige bunts it back to the bowler

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Ali Khan, 1 run, to gully, length delivery on off-stump, eased straight to backward point

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Ali Khan, no run, length delivery outside off, Ali Khan looks to slap it through the off-side and miss
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Ali Khan, no run, length delivery outside off, Ali Khan looks to slap it through the off-side and misses, that beat him for pace. Now then, they've Absolutely nothing on it, that's a

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nosthush Kenjige, 1 run, direct-hit and Ali Khan was gone at the non-striker's end, length delivery ou
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nosthush Kenjige, 1 run, direct-hit and Ali Khan was gone at the non-striker's end, length delivery outside off, Nosthush Kenjige eased it to backward point and Ali Khan was straying a long way out of his crease looking for the single, direct-hit at his end and he was gone, they eventually get the single

short_text: Russell to Ali Khan, , This isn't great bowling, went searching for the yorker on off-stump but undercooked it, Ali Khan
full_text: Russell to Ali Khan, , This isn't great bowling, went searching for the yorker on off-stump but undercooked it, Ali Khan lofted it through the line and back down the ground, just beat long-on to his left to go for one-bounce four, such valuable runs these for the USA

short_text: Russell to Ali Khan, ,Full and outside off, right in the slot and Ali Khan had a free swing at this, made a great connec
full_text: Russell to Ali Khan, ,Full and outside off, right in the slot and Ali Khan had a free swing at this, made a great connection and it went straight back down the ground for a biggie. This is

short_text: Russell to Ali Khan, , Ali Khan misses out, was a full-toss just drifting down leg, looked to glance it fine and missed,
full_text: Russell to Ali Khan, , Ali Khan misses out, was a full-toss just drifting down leg, looked to glance it fine and missed, will get the wide though

short_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, Caught by Charles!!Back of a length and wide outside off, was there to be hit and van Schalkwy
full_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, Caught by Charles!!Back of a length and wide outside off, was there to be hit and van Schalkwyk threw his hands at it, didn't quite get the desired connection and ended up slicing it straight to Charles down at deep point.

short_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, no run, full and slanting away just outside off, van Schalkwyk opened the face of the bat look
full_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, no run, full and slanting away just outside off, van Schalkwyk opened the face of the bat looking to run it down fine but missed

short_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, Milind Kumar Run Out!! Full and on the pads, van Schalkwyk clipped it to short fine-leg, nearl
full_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, Milind Kumar Run Out!! Full and on the pads, van Schalkwyk clipped it to short fine-leg, nearly carried to Motie there and van Schalkwyk was ball-watching, meanwhile Milind Kumar had run all the way down and van Schalkwyk was going nowhere, both batters ended up at the same end and Russell did the rest at the other. 7th wicket goes down for  USA.

short_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, , Full on off-stump, van Schalkwyk stayed deep in his crease and just smacked it back past his
full_text: Russell to van Schalkwyk, , Full on off-stump, van Schalkwyk stayed deep in his crease and just smacked it back past his partner at the other end

full_text: Motie to Milind Kumar, no run, flatter delivery outside off, Milind Kumar presses back to cut and is cramped for room, can't get it past backward point

short_text: Motie to Milind Kumar, no run, full and darting into the pads, Milind Kumar leans in looking for a slog sweep and misses
full_text: Motie to Milind Kumar, no run, full and darting into the pads, Milind Kumar leans in looking for a slog sweep and misses, hit his back thigh and would've angled down leg

short_text: Motie to van Schalkwyk, 1 run, full on the pads, clipped straight to short fine-leg for a quick single
full_text: Motie to van Schalkwyk, 1 run, full on the pads, clipped straight to short fine-leg for a quick single

full_text: Motie to van Schalkwyk, no run, flatter delivery on middle, knocked back towards the bowler

full_text: Motie to van Schalkwyk, , Length delivery wide outside off, allowed van Schalkwyk to free his arms and he flat-batted it straight back down the ground for a much needed boundary

full_text: Motie to Milind Kumar, 1 run, flatter delivery on off-stump, Milind Kumar stabs it towards point for one

full_text: Roston Chase to van Schalkwyk, ,Floated up a touch too full outside off, van Schalkwyk leant in and creamed the drive through extra cover, went to the ropes all along the ground

full_text: Roston Chase to van Schalkwyk, no run, length delivery on middle, van Schalkwyk presses back and blocks

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to van Schalkwyk, no run, back of a length on middle, van Schalkwyk gets on his toes to pat it back to the bowler

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Milind Kumar, 1 run, length delivery on off-stump, Milind Kumar presses back and gently nudges it towards point for another quick single

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to van Schalkwyk, 1 run, banged in short on leg-stump, van Schalkwyk takes his eyes off it as it climbs on him, hits his gloves and drops into the leg-side as they pinch a run

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Milind Kumar, 1 run, length delivery outside off, Milind Kumar opens the face of the bat and runs it down to third man

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to van Schalkwyk, 1 run, just short of length on off-stump, van Schalkwyk drops it into the off-side and they pinch a quick single

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to van Schalkwyk, no run, full and just outside off, van Schalkwyk pushes at it and gets an inside edge that rolls back to the bowler

full_text: Roston Chase to van Schalkwyk, 1 run, tossed up full on off-stump, pushed down the ground to long off

full_text: Roston Chase to Milind Kumar, 1 run, flatter delivery outside off, Milind Kumar rocks back and slaps it away to deep cover

short_text: Roston Chase to van Schalkwyk, 1 run, flatter delivery fired in at the pads, van Schalkwyk presses back and works it awa
full_text: Roston Chase to van Schalkwyk, 1 run, flatter delivery fired in at the pads, van Schalkwyk presses back and works it away to long leg

short_text: Roston Chase to Harmeet Singh, Caught by Charles!! Lovely bowling this from Roston Chase, tossed up full and just outsid
full_text: Roston Chase to Harmeet Singh, Caught by Charles!! Lovely bowling this from Roston Chase, tossed up full and just outside off, slowed it up nicely and Harmeet Singh was through his shot far too early as he leant in looking to work it into the leg-side, there was just enough turn for it to catch the leading edge as he closed the face of the bat and it lobbed up to Charles at backward point. Simplest of catches and it's just gone from bad to worse for USA. What's more, Chase will be on a hat-trick!

short_text: Roston Chase to Corey Anderson, Lbw!! Roston Chase has got another one and it's the dangerous Corey Anderson this time.
full_text: Roston Chase to Corey Anderson, Lbw!! Roston Chase has got another one and it's the dangerous Corey Anderson this time. A length delivery on middle, darted in a touch quicker and Corey Anderson went right back looking to work it into the leg-side, he missed and was struck on the back pad, couldn't have been more plumb in front. Easy decision for the umpire and Anderson, after considering the review for a second, thinks the better of it and walks off. USA in a bit of strife here.

short_text: Roston Chase to Corey Anderson, no run, length delivery outside off, Corey Anderson presses back and slaps it straight t
full_text: Roston Chase to Corey Anderson, no run, length delivery outside off, Corey Anderson presses back and slaps it straight to short cover

short_text: Obed McCoy to Milind Kumar, , boundary to end the over! Shortish outside off at 118.5kph, Milind Kumar rocks back, hops
full_text: Obed McCoy to Milind Kumar, , boundary to end the over! Shortish outside off at 118.5kph, Milind Kumar rocks back, hops and cuts backward of square on the off-side. Excellent placement and even the timing is spot-on

full_text: Obed McCoy to Corey Anderson, 1 run, 132.3kph, back of a length, tapped in front of backward point with an opened bat-face

full_text: Obed McCoy to Corey Anderson, , off-cutter down the leg-side

full_text: Obed McCoy to Milind Kumar, 1 run, 129.8kph, pace off into the wicket, pulled to deep square leg

full_text: Obed McCoy to Corey Anderson, 1 run, very full and straighter line, turned through square leg

full_text: Obed McCoy to Corey Anderson, no run, starts his new spell with a slower ball. Not picked by Anderson and the ball comes in off the deck to beat Anderson's inside edge

full_text: Roston Chase to Corey Anderson, 1 run, stays back to drive and outside-edges to short third man. Anderson is slow to take off but makes his ground easily

full_text: Russell to Milind Kumar, 2 runs, 136.4kph, back of a length, cut to the left of backward point. Third man runs across to his right and quickly releases it to the keeper. Pooran hits the target at the bowler's end but Anderson is comfortably in. Easy call for the TV umpire

full_text: Russell to Milind Kumar, , 139.1kph, Russell goes for the yorker and slips it just down leg, past Milind's flick

full_text: Roston Chase to Corey Anderson, no run, 92.6kph, drives this full ball but Chase is quick to move to his left and stop the single. Excellent first over from Chase

full_text: Roston Chase to Milind Kumar, 1 run, full on leg, glanced away towards short fine leg where Russell makes a tumbling stop

full_text: Roston Chase to Aaron Jones, Bowled!! 94kph, flat and quick angled in, Aaron Jones gets down to play a premeditated slogsweep and doesn't connect as he's beaten for pace. The ball brushes his back thigh before deflecting onto the stumps.

full_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, 1 run, skips down the track and push-drives to long-off

full_text: Motie to Corey Anderson, 1 run, bowls this wider and Corey Anderson chops it to the left of deep cover to get off the mark. Aaron Jones wants the second, denied by Anderson

full_text: Motie to Corey Anderson, no run, over the wicket, very full, driven back to Motie

full_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, 1 run, 88.2kph, Motie follows a backing away batter and that's been swept to long leg

full_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, no run, Jones goes for the reverse-sweep, Motie sees that and fires it down leg. Not sure if there was any bat there, Pooran was quick to run back and prevent the single

full_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, 2 runs, 86.2kph, slow and slightly short, Aaron Jones backs away to cut it to the left of deep point. Good running results in a couple of runs

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Corey Anderson, no run, short of a good length ball with a slip in place, Anderson watchfully defends it out. End of an eventful over

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, Caught by Shai Hope!! A wicket for Alzarri Joseph! 136kph, Gous shapes to pull this short ball o
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, Caught by Shai Hope!! A wicket for Alzarri Joseph! 136kph, Gous shapes to pull this short ball over cow corner but the timing goes awry. Hope comes in and moves to his left from deep midwicket to take a calm catch.

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, 1 run, shortish ball and Aaron Jones hops to nudge it towards square leg. Hits the top pa
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, 1 run, shortish ball and Aaron Jones hops to nudge it towards square leg. Hits the top part of the bat

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, no run, typical angry response from the fast bowler! 141.1kph, pacy bouncer with good lif
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, no run, typical angry response from the fast bowler! 141.1kph, pacy bouncer with good lift on it and Aaron Jones ducks underneath it

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, , that's a biggie! 145kph, short ball that sits up nicely for the batter. Hip-high, Jones
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, , that's a biggie! 145kph, short ball that sits up nicely for the batter. Hip-high, Jones clears his front leg and pummels it over deep midwicket with a superb pull shot for a On the roof!

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, , 140.8kph, Aaron Jones walks forward and across, Joseph darts a short of length ball dow
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Aaron Jones, , 140.8kph, Aaron Jones walks forward and across, Joseph darts a short of length ball down leg. The batsman pulls out from flicking it away for it to be wided

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, 1 run, 140kph, in-slanter, Gous is stuck in his crease as he pushes at it. Gets an inside edge o
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, 1 run, 140kph, in-slanter, Gous is stuck in his crease as he pushes at it. Gets an inside edge onto his pad and the batsmen scamper across for a quick single

short_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, no run, 83.5kph, decent bounce from a length and that's been pushed to cover. Tidy opening over fr
full_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, no run, 83.5kph, decent bounce from a length and that's been pushed to cover. Tidy opening over from Motie

full_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, no run, chopped to point

full_text: Motie to Aaron Jones, no run, 87.9kph, fullish delivery, Aaron Jones backs away to drive through the off-side and inside-edges towards the leg-side

short_text: Motie to Nitish Kumar, Lbw!! 86.4kph, tossed up ball, drifts in and dips on the batter. Nitish Kumar looks to play a pre
full_text: Motie to Nitish Kumar, Lbw!! 86.4kph, tossed up ball, drifts in and dips on the batter. Nitish Kumar looks to play a premeditated reverse-sweep and misses it to get hit on the pad adjacent to the sticks. He's been given out lbw but he reviews after a chat with his batting partner. UltraEdge confirms no bat. Over to ball-tracking and it's three reds. Allahudien Paleker's call stays. USA lose a review and the impressive Nitish Kumar has to depart. Much-needed wicket for West Indies and Motie has broken the 48-run stand in his first over.

short_text: Motie to Gous, 1 run, 95.6kph, non-turner on a short of length, punched through cover
full_text: Motie to Gous, 1 run, 95.6kph, non-turner on a short of length, punched through cover

full_text: Motie to Gous, 2 runs, 89.1kph, flighted delivery, driven with the spin to the right of extra cover. Long-off has some distance to cover to cut it off

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, 1 run, Short of a length ball, heaved away to deep square leg where Charles takes it on the bounce

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nitish Kumar, 1 run, 140.5kph, leg-lined back of a length delivery, tucked away to deep backward square leg

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, 1 run, Gous looks to drive on the rise. Extra bounce and a thick outside edge is induced. Akeal Hosein dives low to his right, gets both hands but fails to hold onto it. A costly drop?

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, , shot! Excellent pick-up shot. Length ball slanted in and that's been dumped into the square le
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, , shot! Excellent pick-up shot. Length ball slanted in and that's been dumped into the square leg stands. Good swing of the bat and the ball flies all the way

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, , 141.2kph, full on middle and leg, Gous stays in his crease and plays across the line with a bi
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, , 141.2kph, full on middle and leg, Gous stays in his crease and plays across the line with a big back-lift. Decent contact and the ball races away to the midwicket fence

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nitish Kumar, 1 run, 140.2kph, very full and following a backing away batter. Nitish Kumar can only wrist it towards mid-on for a single

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Gous, , 1 run, 142.3kph, fuller than a length outside off, Gous drives it to deep backward point. Joseph has overstepped

full_text: Obed McCoy to Nitish Kumar, no run, length ball pushed across the right-hander, Nitish Kumar stays leg-side and throws his arms to smash it through the off-side, no dice as he doesn't connect. Beaten on the outside edge and there's good carry-through to the keeper

full_text: Obed McCoy to Nitish Kumar, 2 runs, back of a length, punched to deep backward point for a couple more

full_text: Obed McCoy to Nitish Kumar, , 133.3kph, McCoy shortens his length, no real venom to trouble and the batter pounces. Nitish Kumar stands tall to slam the pull over wide mid-on

full_text: Obed McCoy to Nitish Kumar, 2 runs, 134.6kph, full and shaping in, flicked to deep midwicket off the inner half of the bat

short_text: Obed McCoy to Nitish Kumar, , wow! That's a shot hit with authroity. Backs away a long way, exposes all the sticks in th
full_text: Obed McCoy to Nitish Kumar, , wow! That's a shot hit with authroity. Backs away a long way, exposes all the sticks in the process. Gets an overpitched delivery and he gets under it to carve it over extra cover

full_text: Obed McCoy to Nitish Kumar, no run, 135kph, McCoy starts with a high full toss from over the wicket. A backing away Nitish Kumar looks to flay it away but doesn't connect

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Nitish Kumar, 1 run, 93.5kph, punched to the right of point for a sharp single. Chase makes a superb stop diving to his right and is quick to release the ball but the throw isn't on target

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Gous, 1 run, 92.8kph, comes down the track and pushes at this length ball without getting anywhere close to the pitch of the ball, inside-edges to backward square leg

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Nitish Kumar, 1 run, 96.2kph, full outside off, driven to the right of Charles at cover point and a misfield allows the batters to rotate strike

short_text: Russell to Gous, , 133.8kph, pierces the gap on this occasion. Back of a length delivery with not much room, Gous hops o
full_text: Russell to Gous, , 133.8kph, pierces the gap on this occasion. Back of a length delivery with not much room, Gous hops onto the back foot to solidly punch it to the right of a diving backward point fielder. The cover-point fielder chases but the ball wins the race comfortably

short_text: Russell to Gous, no run, 138.7kph, fuller than a length, swings away and Gous drives off the front foot. The fielder at
full_text: Russell to Gous, no run, 138.7kph, fuller than a length, swings away and Gous drives off the front foot. The fielder at cover-point makes a diving stop to his left

full_text: Russell to Nitish Kumar, 1 run, 137.6kph, straighter line and that's been tucked away to deep square leg

short_text: Russell to Nitish Kumar, 2 runs, 130.8kph, Nitish Kumar stays in his crease to drive with the swing to the right of a di
full_text: Russell to Nitish Kumar, 2 runs, 130.8kph, Nitish Kumar stays in his crease to drive with the swing to the right of a diving backward point fielder

short_text: Russell to Steven Taylor, Caught by Roston Chase!! Sharp catch at backward point! Russell strikes with his second ball.
full_text: Russell to Steven Taylor, Caught by Roston Chase!! Sharp catch at backward point! Russell strikes with his second ball. Length ball wide of off, Steven Taylor sees the width and throws his bat hard for a cut. The ball dips on the fielder but Chase gets low to snaffle it cleanly with both hands. West Indies have the early breakthrough and the crowd is delighted.

short_text: Russell to Steven Taylor, no run, nice swing into the left-hander as Russell darts a very full ball from over the wicket
full_text: Russell to Steven Taylor, no run, nice swing into the left-hander as Russell darts a very full ball from over the wicket, the left-handed batter squeezes it towards backward point

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, 1 run, 93.7kph, round the wicket now. On the shorter side again, pulled to deep square le
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, 1 run, 93.7kph, round the wicket now. On the shorter side again, pulled to deep square leg's left for a single

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, no run, 94.2kph, shortish ball and Akeal Hosein gets away. Steven Taylor pulls hard and i
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, no run, 94.2kph, shortish ball and Akeal Hosein gets away. Steven Taylor pulls hard and inside-edges it onto his body

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Gous, 1 run, 92kph, round the wicket, knocks this short of length ball down to long-on

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, 1 run, 89.4kph, very full, jammed towards short extra cover and the batters scamper across for a single after a slight miscommunication

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, no run, 95.9kph, pushed through quicker and Steven Taylor shapes to pull. Misses and lose
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, no run, 95.9kph, pushed through quicker and Steven Taylor shapes to pull. Misses and loses his balance in the process. There's an appeal for lbw but it's too high as it hit his body

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, no run, over the wicket, spin straightaway for Akeal. Turns in from a length to cramp the
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Steven Taylor, no run, over the wicket, spin straightaway for Akeal. Turns in from a length to cramp the batter for room who punches it back to the bowler off the back foot

short_text: Netravalkar to Shai Hope, , all over!! Pitched up delivery on off stump, Hope clears his front leg and swings through th
full_text: Netravalkar to Shai Hope, , all over!! Pitched up delivery on off stump, Hope clears his front leg and swings through the line of the ball. All too easy for him and the ball sails over long-off into the celebrating crowds.

short_text: Netravalkar to Pooran, 1 run, length ball outside off, slapped to the right of long-off
full_text: Netravalkar to Pooran, 1 run, length ball outside off, slapped to the right of long-off

short_text: Netravalkar to Pooran, , jeez, where do you bowl? Netravalkar tries to go wide outside off, tries to hide it from the sw
full_text: Netravalkar to Pooran, , jeez, where do you bowl? Netravalkar tries to go wide outside off, tries to hide it from the swinging arc. Pooran gets closer to reach for it and slices it over extra cover for a maximum.

short_text: Netravalkar to Pooran, , launched!! Pitched up and in the swinging arc, Pooran stays in his crease and it is just a case
full_text: Netravalkar to Pooran, , launched!! Pitched up and in the swinging arc, Pooran stays in his crease and it is just a case of range hitting then for the dangerous southpaw. A clean swing across the line over deep mid-wicket into the stands

short_text: Netravalkar to Shai Hope, 1 run, fraction short of length outside off, flat batted down to long-off. Gets to the fielder
full_text: Netravalkar to Shai Hope, 1 run, fraction short of length outside off, flat batted down to long-off. Gets to the fielder on the bounce

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, , stand and deliver stuff!! Half volley from van Schalkwyk, pitched up onto off stump. Pooran s
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, , stand and deliver stuff!! Half volley from van Schalkwyk, pitched up onto off stump. Pooran shuffles in and then has a clean swing down the ground. A couple of bounces and four to the right of long-on

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, , too far wide outside off
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, , too far wide outside off

full_text: van Schalkwyk to Shai Hope, 1 run, in the air... lands safe!! Once again pace off and on a length. Hope slaps it over the bowler's head but toe-ends this time and it goes high up in the air but lands between extra cover running back and long-off haring forwards

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, 1 run, slower full delivery just outside off, Pooran goes for the big slog sweep which is insid
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, 1 run, slower full delivery just outside off, Pooran goes for the big slog sweep which is inside halved towards deep mid-wicket

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, no run, hard length delivery onto middle and leg,
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, no run, hard length delivery onto middle and leg,

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, , out of here!! A pace off delivery onto the stumps. Pooran anticipated it, stays in his crease
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, , out of here!! A pace off delivery onto the stumps. Pooran anticipated it, stays in his crease and tonks it across the line over deep mid-wicket for a massive 90m six.

full_text: van Schalkwyk to Pooran, no run, pace off angling onto off stump, cut towards backward point

short_text: Milind Kumar to Shai Hope, , Fired in full outside off, Hope gets under it and goes over extra cover. Hits it true and h
full_text: Milind Kumar to Shai Hope, , Fired in full outside off, Hope gets under it and goes over extra cover. Hits it true and hits it flat, hits it all the way. He's really enjoying himself out there today...

short_text: Milind Kumar to Shai Hope, , another one!! Too short from Milind Kumar once again. Allows Hope to stay in his crease and
full_text: Milind Kumar to Shai Hope, , another one!! Too short from Milind Kumar once again. Allows Hope to stay in his crease and just range hit these for fun. This time over deep mid-wicket for six

short_text: Milind Kumar to Shai Hope, , a half tracker from Milind Kumar, Shai Hope accepts the gift. Stays in his crease and clobb
full_text: Milind Kumar to Shai Hope, , a half tracker from Milind Kumar, Shai Hope accepts the gift. Stays in his crease and clobbers it across the line over cow corner for a maximum

full_text: Milind Kumar to Pooran, , too far wide outside off and the keeper parries it towards short third. An extra run taken

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Charles, Caught by Milind Kumar!! Holes out!! Tossed up slightly and at the stumps, Charles can't resis
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Charles, Caught by Milind Kumar!! Holes out!! Tossed up slightly and at the stumps, Charles can't resist from having a go at this one. Plays a big slog sweep and connects pretty well, but Milind Kumar at deep mid-wicket takes a solid catch hugging the boundary ropes. Judges it well and ensures his feet were well inside the rope. Something to celebrate for USA.

full_text: Harmeet Singh to Shai Hope, , pushed fuller and wider outside off, Hope throws his hands at it. All muscle on that one as he slaps it flat over long-off for a maximum.

full_text: Harmeet Singh to Charles, , Floated up full on leg-stump, Charles was standing well outside the leg stump, this was right in the slot and he smacked it over mid-on
